title: Character Counter
seoDescription: Free online character counter. Count characters, words, lines, sentences, and spaces instantly. Perfect for social media posts, essays, and SEO meta descriptions.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Character Counter
step1Desc: Type or paste your text into the input area. The counter updates in real-time.
step2Desc: See character count (with and without spaces), word count, line count, and sentence count.
step3Desc: Use the counts to optimize for Twitter (280), meta descriptions (160), or essay requirements.
faq1A: We show both counts: total characters (with spaces) and characters without spaces.
faq2A: Words are separated by spaces. Empty lines are not counted.
faq3A: No hard limit. The counter works with any text length in real-time.
